Home / Patients / Insurance & Coverage

Insurance & Coverage

CMC serves all patients regardless of their ability to pay. Our staff can help you enroll in coverage — no appointment needed.

Please bring your insurance ID card and any required copayments to your appointment.

Need Enrollment Help?

Certified Enrollment Counselors are available:

(209) 373-2824

Insurance Accepted

  • ✓ Medi-Cal
  • ✓ Medi-Cal Managed Care (Health Plan of San Joaquin, Health Net, Partnership Health Plan of California)
  • ✓ Medicare
  • ✓ Medicare Advantage Plans
  • ✓ Covered California

Uninsured? Depending on your family size, income, and housing, you may qualify for free or low-cost care. Our Health Coverage Counselors can help.

For Stockton Residents

Mobile Community Response: In partnership with the City of Stockton, Community Medical Centers offers an alternative to 911 for Stockton citizens in need of behavioral health services. If you or someone you know is experiencing mental distress, please call (833) 311-2273, 7 days a week, 8:00 am to 11:00 pm. This helpline is for non-violent individuals with mild to moderate symptoms.
